context.projectOverview: Bober Vision Tier 3. Sprint 19 implements src/incident/ — types + append helpers (createIncident, appendTimeline/Observation/Action/Change/RunbookExecution, setIncidentStatus, listIncidents). zod schemas with REQUIRED inverse on ChangeEntry. Atomic appends. Mutex pattern from Sprint 13's audit.ts.

completedSprints.title: Audit trail
completedSprints.summary: src/orchestrator/checkpoints/audit.ts: append-only JSONL via fs.open(O_WRONLY|O_APPEND|O_CREAT, 0o600) + fh.chmod(0o600), per-runId Promise-chain mutex. Reuse this pattern.

completedSprints.title: bober-diagnoser agent
completedSprints.summary: DiagnosisResult schema; writes to .bober/incidents/<id>/diagnoses/<diagnosisId>.json (this sprint creates the diagnoses/ subdir).

completedSprints.title: bober.diagnose skill
completedSprints.summary: References observations.jsonl, changelog.jsonl, hypotheses.md, actions.jsonl — names must match.

completedSprints.title: bober.runbook skill
completedSprints.summary: Locked the 7 camelCase field names for runbook-execution.jsonl: timestamp, runbookName, stepNumber, status, preconditionResult, postconditionResult, rollbackTriggered?
